get.description: Browse all available agents in the marketplace (built-in + third-party).

schema.title: Source

schema.description: Search by name, description, or tags
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search by name, description, or tags

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific marketplace agent.

delete.description:
Remove a third-party agent from the marketplace.

Only marketplace (non-builtin) agents can be removed.
Requires ``marketplace.manage`` permission.

post.description:
Register a new third-party agent from a manifest.

Requires ``marketplace.manage`` permission.

Run a sandbox test for a marketplace agent.

Executes the agent in an isolated environment with timeout
enforcement. Requires ``marketplace.manage`` permission.

get.description: List all available agent categories with counts.

schema.title: Response List Marketplace Categories V1 Marketplace Categories Get

post.description:
Invalidate the in-process model registry cache.

After this call the next invocation of ``load_model_registry()`` will
re-read ``apps/web/data/llm_models.json`` from disk, enabling zero-downtime
registry updates without a process restart.

Requires ``config.write`` permission (enforced by RBAC middleware).

schema.title: Response Clear Model Registry Cache Endpoint V1 Admin Model Registry Cache Clear Post

post.description:
Trigger in-process LLM API key and JWKS cache rotation.

Clears the OIDC discovery document cache and the JWKS cache maintained by
``security.auth``, forcing fresh resolution on the next inbound request.
This is the HTTP-triggered complement to the SIGUSR1 signal handler
installed at startup.

Requires ``config.write`` permission (enforced by RBAC middleware).

schema.title: Response Rotate Llm Keys Endpoint V1 Admin Llm Keys Rotate Post
